title: Top Performing ETFs of Q2 2026: Tech and Healthcare Lead Gains
description: Technology and healthcare sector ETFs have delivered double-digit returns in Q2 2026, with AI-focused funds gaining over 30% year-to-date.

title: Bitcoin ETF Inflows Hit Record $2.8 Billion in Single Week
description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their highest weekly inflow ever as institutional adoption accelerates following clearer regulatory guidelines from the SEC.
